title: Opioid Deep Dive
description: Per-opioid sex bias analysis: morphine, oxycodone, fentanyl, tramadol, hydrocodone, codeine, buprenorphine, methadone, and more

opioid_vs_baseline.interpretation: Opioids show significantly different sex bias than overall

top_10_female_biased.adverse_event: Accidental exposure to product by child

top_10_male_biased.adverse_event: Prescription drug used without a prescription

kruskal_wallis.interpretation: Log ratio distributions differ across opioids

key_findings: OXYCODONE has the most signals (890), 80.0% female-biased
